title: S3 Storage and File I/O Flow
interaction_flow_load_from_s3_with_cache: Caller → misc: load_from_s3_with_cache(s3_path, cache_fp=None, cache_dir=None, rank_sync=True, backend_args, backend_key, easy_io_kwargs)
misc → misc: download_from_s3_with_cache(s3_path, cache_fp, cache_dir, rank_sync, backend_args, backend_key)
misc → misc: derive cache_fp = cache_dir / s3_path.replace('s3://', '')
misc → distributed: get_rank() → check if rank==0 for empty-file cleanup
[rank_sync=True, cache miss] misc → easy_io: copyfile_to_local(s3_path, cache_fp, dst_type='file', backend_args, backend_key)
boto3._client → S3: HTTP GET object [up to 3 retries]
boto3._client → Boto3Client: bytes in BytesIO buffer
misc → distributed: barrier() [rank sync after download]
interaction_flow_multipart_upload: Caller → Boto3Backend: fast_put(obj: bytes|BytesIO|str, filepath, num_processes=32)
Boto3Client → Boto3Client: read obj into bytes (bytes/BytesIO/file path)
Boto3Client → Boto3Client: if file_size <= part_size*num_processes: fallback to put()
ProcessPoolExecutor → upload_parts_to_s3: (part_numbers, upload_id, part_size, chunk_data, bucket, key, client_config)
AsyncEventLoop → upload_parts_async: (part_size, part_numbers, upload_id, data, bucket, key, client_config)
upload_parts_async → upload_parts_async: build tasks = [upload_single_part_async(...) for each part]
upload_single_part_async → aioboto3_S3Client: s3.upload_part(Bucket, Key, PartNumber, UploadId, Body) [retries with exp backoff, MAX_RETRIES=5]
Boto3Client → boto3._client: complete_multipart_upload(Bucket, Key, UploadId, Parts)
interaction_flow_multipart_download: Caller → download_parts_to_s3: (part_numbers, part_size, bucket, key, client_config, shm_name)
AsyncEventLoop → download_parts_async: (part_size, part_numbers, bucket, key, client_config, shm_name)
download_parts_async → aioboto3_S3Client: aioboto3.Session().client('s3', config=AioConfig) [retries=5, adaptive, timeout=10/30s]
download_parts_async → download_parts_async: build tasks = [download_single_part_async(...) for part_number in part_numbers]
download_single_part_async → aioboto3_S3Client: s3.get_object(Bucket, Key, Range='bytes={start}-{end}') [MAX_RETRIES=5, exp backoff]
download_parts_async → download_parts_to_s3: (None; data in shared memory)
key_relationships: FileClient wraps BaseStorageBackend (singleton pattern, backends dict: disk→HardDiskBackend, http→HTTPBackend)
Boto3Backend extends BaseStorageBackend; composes Boto3Client as _client
Boto3Client owns boto3.client('s3') as _client and optional _mc_kv_store (memcached)
easy_io (FileClient instance) used by misc.load_from_s3_with_cache via easy_io.copyfile_to_local and easy_io.load
Boto3Backend path pipeline: _map_path(path_mapping dict) → _format_path(fix backslashes) → _replace_prefix(strip nothing, legacy)
fast_put uses ProcessPoolExecutor (process-level) + per-process asyncio event loop + aioboto3 for parallelism
download_parts_async writes to multiprocessing.shared_memory (SharedMemory) for zero-copy IPC
distributed.barrier() called after rank-0 download in load_from_s3_with_cache for DDP sync
important_notes: Part size for multipart upload: 16 MB; fallback to single put if file_size <= part_size * num_processes
MAX_RETRIES=5 for downloads, 5 for upload_single_part (3 for AioConfig session); exponential backoff with asyncio.sleep(RETRY_DELAY * 2^attempt)
Boto3Client.get() checks optional _mc_kv_store (memcached) as L1 cache before hitting S3
download_from_s3_with_cache: only rank-0 downloads; all ranks sync via distributed.barrier(); cache_dir from TORCH_HOME → COSMOS_CACHE_DIR → ~/.cache/cosmos
load_from_s3_with_cache delegates download to download_from_s3_with_cache, then loads via easy_io.load(cache_fp)
aioboto3/aiobotocore optional import; aioboto3=None if not installed; fast_put asserts aioboto3 available
Boto3Client credentials loaded from JSON file via auto_auth module (prod/dev/stg envs skip file check)
FileClient (cosmos_predict1) only supports disk+http backends; Boto3Backend is NOT registered here — easy_io in Lyra-2 has it registered
